allow: Bash(node -e "require\('./src/app'\); console.log\('APP_OK: all routes/controllers/services load cleanly'\);")

Bash(node -e "const h=require\('http-status'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(h\).slice\(0,20\)\); console.log\('default?', typeof h.default\); console.log\('h.status?', typeof h.status\); console.log\('CREATED via default:', h.default && h.default.CREATED\); console.log\('CONFLICT via status:', h.status && h.status.CONFLICT\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const files=['src/integrations/sms.js','src/middlewares/validation.middleware.js','src/middlewares/auth.middleware.js','src/app.js','src/utils/helpers.js','src/controllers/chat.controller.js','src/controllers/admin.controller.js','src/controllers/deal.controller.js','src/controllers/auth.controller.js','src/middlewares/error.middleware.js','src/controllers/group.controller.js','src/services/admin.service.js','src/controllers/user.controller.js','src/controllers/vendor.controller.js','src/services/auth.service.js','src/services/otp.service.js'];let n=0;for\(const f of files\){const s=fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\);const r=s.replace\(\\"require\('http-status'\);\\",\\"require\('http-status'\).status;\\"\);if\(r!==s\){fs.writeFileSync\(f,r\);n++;}}console.log\('patched',n,'files'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);for\(const f of ['src/validations/auth.validation.js','src/validations/admin.validation.js']\){let s=fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\);const r=s.replace\(/\\.email\\\(\\\)/g,'.email\({ tlds: false }\)'\);fs.writeFileSync\(f,r\);console.log\(f, s!==r?'updated':'no-change'\);}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const f='src/redux/asyncActions/authActions.js';let s=fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\);const n=\(s.match\(/dispatch\\\(setLoading\\\(true\\\)\\\);/g\)||[]\).length;s=s.split\('dispatch\(setLoading\(true\)\);'\).join\('begin\(dispatch\);'\);fs.writeFileSync\(f,s\);console.log\('replaced',n,'setLoading\(true\) calls with begin\(dispatch\)'\);")
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \\"name='node.exe'\\" | Select-Object ProcessId,CreationDate | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String")
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String")

Bash(node -e "require\('./src/models/Category'\); require\('./src/services/category.service'\); require\('./src/controllers/category.controller'\); require\('./src/validations/category.validation'\); require\('./src/routes/category.routes'\); require\('./src/routes'\); console.log\('OK: category modules load'\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('./src/integrations/cloudinary'\); require\('./src/middlewares/upload.middleware'\); require\('./src/controllers/upload.controller'\); require\('./src/routes/upload.routes'\); require\('./src/routes'\); console.log\('OK: upload modules load'\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('./src/models/Group'\); require\('./src/services/group.service'\); require\('./src/controllers/admin.controller'\); require\('./src/validations/admin.validation'\); require\('./src/routes/admin.routes'\); require\('./src/services/admin.service'\); console.log\('OK: all admin/group modules load'\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('./src/models/Group'\); require\('./src/services/group.service'\); require\('./src/controllers/group.controller'\); require\('./src/controllers/admin.controller'\); require\('./src/validations/admin.validation'\); require\('./src/validations/group.validation'\); require\('./src/routes/group.routes'\); require\('./src/routes/admin.routes'\); console.log\('OK: backend modules load'\);")
